channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Romney: ‘You can’t complain’ if Trump does what he says he would do
item.description: “Donald Trump won. He won overwhelmingly. He said what he was going to do, and that’s what he’s doing,” Romney said Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, KRON4

item.title: Spotify too repetitive? Here's how to retrain the algorithm
item.description: Over the past couple years, complaints have piled up in online forums from music lovers having trouble discovering new music. Why? No matter what they do, Spotify seems to be serving them the same old songs, again and again.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The original lyrics of 'Have Yourself a Merry Little Christmas' were extremely depressing
item.description: “Have Yourself a Merry Little Christmas” is already more melancholy than most classic Christmas songs, but its earlier version was a downright downer.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Photos: US storms bring heavy snow, dangerous ice and a tornado in California
item.description: In San Francisco, authorities issued the first-ever tornado warning. Meanwhile, upstate New York saw heavy snow, the Midwest encountered an ice storm, and severe weather warnings were issued around Lake Tahoe.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Thousands of Santas and a few Grinches hit the streets for annual SantaCon bar crawls
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Santa Clauses are coming to town. Thousands of Kris Kringles and jolly Old St. Nicks are jamming streets, sidewalks, and bars from Adelaide to Vancouver on Saturday for the annual SantaCon charity pub crawls.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Former Manhattan prosecutor to represent suspect in killing of UnitedHealthcare’s CEO
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The suspect in the killing of UnitedHealthcare’s CEO has added a prominent defense lawyer to his legal team as Manhattan prosecutors work to return him from Pennsylvania to face a murder charge.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: The GOP stoked fears of noncitizens voting. Cases in Ohio show how rhetoric and reality diverge
item.description: Ohio's Republican secretary of state and attorney general sought to reassure voters before the November election that the state's elections were being vigorously protected against the possibility of immigrants voting illegally.
item.dc:creator: Julie Carr Smyth, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Colorado two-way star Travis Hunter wins Heisman Trophy as college football's top player
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Travis Hunter turned every play into prime time — on both sides of the ball — and ultimately took home the Heisman Trophy. Now he’s got a leg up on his celebrity coach at Colorado.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Millionaire boomers less likely to share their wealth: Charles Schwab
item.description: Data revealed that baby boomers, born from 1946 to 1964, plan to spend most of their wealth rather than reserve it for future generations.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, KREX 5

item.title: Blake Horvath shines as Navy dominates in a 31-13 victory over Bryson Daily and No. 19 Army
item.description: LANDOVER, Md. (AP) — This was an Army-Navy game unlike any before it. The teams had combined for 19 victories this season before their annual clash, a record for the rivalry. Of course, only one of them would be responsible for No. 20 — the biggest win of them all. “I think they're like us.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: ABC settles Trump’s defamation suit for $15M
item.description: The settlement enables both the anchor and Trump to avoid sitting for court-ordered depositions next week.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: VIDEO: San Francisco cafe employee takes down would-be thief
item.description: The video (above) shows a man wearing a black hoodie and mask walking into the cafe and trying to take an item from a customer dining inside.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Middle East latest: Top diplomats from US, Arab League and Turkey discuss Syria's transition
item.description: Top diplomats from the United States, the Arab League and Turkey met in Jordan on Saturday to discuss how to assist Syria ’s transition after the fall of Bashar Assad's government a week ago. No Syrian representatives attended.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Obesity rate among US adults fell in 2023 for first time in over a decade: Study
item.description: The obesity rate among U.S. adults fell in 2023 for the first time in over a decade, according to a new study released on Friday. The study published in the journal JAMA Health Forum found that obesity nationwide has dropped from 46 percent in 2022 to 45.6 percent last year.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5

item.title: Storms encase Iowa and eastern Nebraska in ice and generate first tornado warning in San Francisco
item.description: A major ice storm has created treacherous driving conditions across Iowa and eastern Nebraska and prompted temporary closures of Interstate 80 after numerous cars and trucks slid off the road.
item.dc:creator: Josh Funk, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: UnitedHealthcare CEO killing suspect retains high-powered New York attorney
item.description: Luigi Mangione, the suspect in the killing of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson, has retained a high-powered New York attorney as he faces a second-degree murder charge.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former governor spots mystery drones in Maryland, blasts feds for lack of transparency
item.description: Former Republican Gov. Larry Hogan of Maryland has said that he personally witnessed "dozens of large drones" flying above his home in Davidsonville, Maryland, on Thursday evening.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lawmakers tell Apple, Google to prepare for TikTok ban
item.description: TikTok now plans to appeal to the Supreme Court and has asked the D.C. Circuit to put the law on hold while it appeals the case.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, Fox 5

item.title: Del Valle ISD workers sue district, custodian after hidden camera footage found
item.description: Del Valle ISD faces a lawsuit by employees who allege that the district failed to protect them and others from a former employee, who they claim installed a hidden camera in a restroom.
item.dc:creator: Cora Neas, NewsNation

item.title: Manchin: Biden 'went completely insane on me' over American Rescue Plan opposition
item.description: “I was going to kill the whole bill. Then the president went completely insane on me,” Manchin said in an interview with news outlet Semafor that was published on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, NewsNation

item.title: Woman who falsely accused Duke lacrosse players of rape in 2006 publicly admits she lied
item.description: RALEIGH, N.C. (AP) — The woman who in 2006 falsely accused three Duke University lacrosse players of raping her — making national headlines that stirred tensions about race, class and the privilege of college athletes — has admitted publicly for the first time that she made up the story.
item.dc:creator: MAKIYA SEMINERA, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: California DMV apologizes for Cybertruck's offensive license plate
item.description: On Thursday, the license plate in question, which was on a Tesla Cybertruck, was spotlighted in a post to X by StopAntisemitism, a group “dedicated to fighting anti-Semitism.
item.dc:creator: Vivian Chow, KRON4

item.title: A man has pleaded guilty to the death of a 5-year-old girl living in their Kansas homeless camp
item.description: TOPEKA, Kan. (AP) — A man who lived in a makeshift camp with a homeless 5-year-old Kansas girl and her father pleaded guilty Friday to first-degree murder and rape in connection with the child’s death.
item.dc:creator: JOHN HANNA and HEATHER HOLLINGSWORTH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: These are the Trump appointees who have faced legal troubles
item.description: President-elect Trump has named several people to his next administration who have faced legal troubles — including Trump himself, who was convicted in a New York hush money case during his 2024 campaign.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Pelosi hospitalized in Luxembourg after sustaining injury from fall on stairs
item.description: Former Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-Calif.) was hospitalized for evaluation in Luxembourg after falling on a set of stairs and sustaining an injury during a trip with a congressional delegation.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Nearly half of US teens are online 'constantly': Pew report
item.description: Nearly half of American teenagers say they are online “constantly” despite concerns about the effects of social media and smartphones on their mental health, according to a new report published Thursday by the Pew Research Center.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Albertsons gives up on Kroger merger, sues the grocery chain
item.description: Kroger and Albertsons in 2022 proposed what would be the largest grocery store merger in U.S. history. The companies said a merger would help them better compete with big retailers like Walmart, Costco and Amazon.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5
